    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class NonGui.BaseEntity.Properties.UnitClass
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class NonGui.BaseEntity.Properties.UnitClass
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    Veigar - Class in NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Mage
    Represents the "Veigar" Hero Card.
    Veigar() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Mage.Veigar
    Constructs Veigar with his base stats and ominous flavor text.
    Volibear - Class in NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Fighter
    Represents the "Volibear" Hero Card.
    Volibear() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Fighter.Volibear
    Constructs Volibear with his base stats and thunderous flavor text.
